## Summary

Describe the change and its user impact.

## Security impact

Describe changes to authentication, authorization, credential handling, audit data, or network exposure. Write “None” when not applicable.

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or private credentials added
